prose:
Electrostatic property computed for methanol.

Method provenance:
Property: Dipole moment magnitude
Level of theory: GFN2-xTB (semi-empirical tight-binding)
Geometry provenance: single-point calculation on the supplied methanol.xyz coordinates (no further relaxation)
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation)
Charge & multiplicity: 0, 1 (closed-shell singlet)
Software: xtb via chemkit backend
Convergence & caveats: SCF converged; no warnings issued by the engine; integrity check trustworthy (partial charges sum to molecular charge within tolerance).

Headline result: μ = 1.9872799 D

Reproducibility: see the live .out log and JSON at the path given in the result’s cli_invocation for full details, inputs, and command line.
